creator: dburr@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Ok, I feel like an idiot.  Turns out that this is a case of PEBKAC 
(Problem Exists Between Keyboard And Chair). 

For the record, I had my 'output plugin' set to the ' 
'DiskWriter' plugin, which saves WAV files instead of playing the mp3's 
on the soundcard.  Once I switched it back to the OSS output driver 
(soundcard), everything works great, streaming SHOUTcast and all.
